note.item: Release Candidate final polish for JT SEO Control Center.
Added Joomla update server metadata to the package manifest.

Includes tabbed dashboard, health checks, article SEO scoring, live article SEO score, SEO audit, bulk meta manager, CSV import/export, sitemap generation, structured data preview, redirect management and 404 logging.
Includes Support card and Quick Start checklist for production use.
JED checker cleanup and schema version alignment.
